headline: How Simon’s Adidas Soccer Events and Outlet Push Will Impact Simon Property Group (SPG) Investors
summary: Simon announced that it partnered with adidas to host soccer fan block parties, watch events, and special product releases at select U.S. centers this summer, while also running National Outlet Shopping Day across 90 locations with thousands of exclusive offers to boost engagement at its malls and outlets. The combination of soccer-themed fan activations, traveling experiential installations, and expanded in-store promotions at 90 adidas retail locations underscores Simon’s push to turn its...
